title: Courier Tracking website
excerpt: I want to create an application where i can show the tracking lines of my user’s couriers so it can be tracked and also it’ll change tracking line color as per the dates stored in the database. If it is Dispatched it’ll …

posts.author: Daminaio (dectatang)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to create an application where i can show the tracking lines of my user’s couriers so it can be tracked and also it’ll change tracking line color as per the dates stored in the database. If it is Dispatched it’ll show Red line and if it is shipped it’ll show blue line and so on. We need to add images dynamically. So when the https://stcouriertracking.com/ is designed there will no timeline images, as data is retrieved from the database and processed we add timeline for each shipment on the page dynamically. Please let me know as i’ve to finish it asap, thanks!

posts.author: EllaG (Ella Grace)
posts.cookedHtml: “Thank you for asking this question because I have the same query as I am also creating an application for my courier tracking website.”

posts.author: jamesmith (James Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Why we use courier tracking service from other companies when you hire a courier company because they have their own tracking system as I have used some companies for the goods shipping.

posts.author: Xdptracking (XDP TRacking)
posts.cookedHtml: If you want to track your parcel in UK, than you must have to try XDP Tracking.

posts.author: jamesmith (James Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: As i had the experience of working with the UK courier company for the shipment of my e-commerce business products. I got a complete courier tracking report of shipping goods for the safety of our products. My question is why we need separate courier tracking service from another company?

posts.author: mmtq (Mir Tarhimul)
posts.cookedHtml: I made a tracker for my AusPost Tracking website.

posts.author: eCourierTracking (Gary Collins)
posts.cookedHtml: eCourierTracking is a website that lets you monitor and trace your shipment and from time to time get to know its status.
